welcome.title: Welcome to ClawX
welcome.description: Your AI assistant is ready to be configured

auth.title: Sign in to UClaw
auth.description: Sign in or register and authorize this device

welcome.title: Welcome to ClawX
welcome.description: ClawX is a graphical interface for OpenClaw, making it easy to use AI assistants across your favorite messaging platforms.

status.activatedForDevice: Your UClaw account, device authorization, and model service are ready.

toast.sendVerifyCodeFailed: Could not send the verification code: {{message}}

errors.device_authorization_required: This device needs an activation code before you can continue.
errors.activation_invalid: The activation code is invalid or expired.
errors.activation_consumed: This activation code has already been used.
errors.activation_ticket_expired: Activation verification expired. Enter the activation code again.
errors.activation_device_mismatch: The activation verification does not match this device.
errors.email_taken: This email address is already registered.
errors.verification_invalid: The verification code is incorrect or expired.
errors.device_required: This device could not be identified. Restart UClaw and try again.
errors.user_exists: This username is already in use.
errors.invalid_username: Use 1-20 letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens for the username.
errors.auth_in_progress: Another account request is in progress. Try again shortly.
errors.provider_conflict: The OpenAI provider is already managed by another configuration.
errors.AUTH_INVALID: Your sign-in has expired. Sign in again.
errors.TIMEOUT: The request timed out. Try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests. Wait and try again.
errors.PERMISSION: This account does not have permission for this action.
errors.NETWORK: Network connection failed. Check your connection and try again.
errors.CONFIG: UClaw configuration is unavailable. Restart the app and try again.
errors.UNKNOWN: UClaw is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

checking.title: Checking your UClaw account
checking.description: Verifying the current account and model service authorization.

loggedOut.title: Sign in to continue
loggedOut.description: Sign in to refresh this device's model service authorization.

loginExpired.title: Your sign-in has expired
loginExpired.description: Sign in to UClaw again to continue.

activationRequired.title: Authorize this device
activationRequired.description: Enter an activation code to authorize this device.

relayMissing.title: Model service is not ready
relayMissing.description: Sign in again to refresh the model service authorization.

error.title: UClaw account status is unavailable
error.description: Check your network connection and try again.

issue.title: Environment issue detected
issue.desc: Please ensure OpenClaw is properly installed. Check the logs for details.

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses {{baseUrl}} and model {{modelId}}. Do not use the general API endpoint for Code Plan traffic.
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.title: Installing Essential Components
installing.subtitle: Setting up the tools needed to power your AI assistant
installing.wait: This may take a few moments...

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: ClawX is configured and ready to use. You can now start chatting with your AI assistant.
complete.footer: You can customize skills and connect channels in Settings
